page_title: ProPlant Protein: Fuel Your Performance Naturally

hero.headline: Plant-Powered Performance: Protein That Pushes Limits
hero.subheadline: Scientifically formulated plant-based protein that delivers maximum nutrition, faster recovery, and sustained energy for athletes who demand more.
hero.image_prompt: Dynamic fitness scene with diverse athletes in modern gym/outdoor setting. Close-up of sleek ProPlant protein powder container. Muscular individuals doing high-intensity workout, surrounded by green plants and clean, energetic lighting. Athletic wear, natural textures, vibrant green and orange color accents.

sections.heading: Why ProPlant Stands Apart
sections.content: Traditional protein supplements fall short. ProPlant delivers a complete amino acid profile sourced entirely from premium plant ingredients, engineered for maximum absorption and minimal environmental impact.
sections.image_prompt: Split-screen comparison showing plant-based protein powder next to traditional whey, with scientific infographic elements highlighting nutritional differences.

features.title: Complete Protein Profile
features.description: Meticulously blended from pea, hemp, and brown rice proteins to provide all 9 essential amino acids your body can't produce on its own.

features.title: Rapid Recovery
features.description: Clinically proven to reduce muscle soreness and accelerate post-workout recovery, helping you train harder and more consistently.

features.title: Sustainable Performance
features.description: Zero compromise nutrition that's kind to your body and the planet. 70% lower carbon footprint compared to animal-based proteins.

testimonials.quote: ProPlant transformed my training. Clean, effective, and actually tastes amazing!
testimonials.name: Alex Rodriguez
testimonials.title: Professional Crossfit Athlete

cta_section.headline: Your Performance, Amplified
cta_section.subheadline: Join thousands of athletes who've upgraded their nutrition with ProPlant.
